calendar.matters:
Motion For Final Judgment As To Interested Party Johnathan Ratcliff; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Antonio Hernandez; Declaration Of Ofc. Anthony Suhrke; Declaration Of Maite Kvarna; Exhibits; Exhibit List; Proposed Order
Off Calendar May-01-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. TONY HERNANDEZ, Esq. of the San Francisco County Distric Attorney's Office (tel: 628-652-4376) for Petitioner.

Hearing Re: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA Motion For Final Judgment As To Interested Party Johnathan Ratcliff.

Matter not argued/contested. Counsel Tony Hernandez provides the Court with a proposed order. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion for final judgment is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
